class.name: SolidWedge
class.description: [SolidWedge] builds an OCCT wedge solid using the right-angular wedge constructor. It behaves like a box whose top face has X length [param ltx], aligned to the global Z axis.

method.name: build_wedge
method.description: Builds a wedge with extents [param dx], [param dy], and [param dz]. [param ltx] sets the X length of the face at [code]y = dy[/code], and [param origin] places the minimum corner.
